description: Case style: Digital watch with a stainless steel round case and and stainless steel backDial style: Digital dial with multiple time display optionsStrap style: Black rubber strap with a tang claspFeatures: Press-buttons on the sides of the case to adjust day and date, alarm, stopwatch, countdown timer, auto backlightWater-resistant 10 BARWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects from the date of purchaseWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
